input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.9.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.9.3.2
            TITLE: function - the primary master switch must:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.9.3.2: Function - the Primary Master Switch must:
IC.9.3.2 Function - the Primary Master Switch must: 
a. Disconnect power to ALL electrical circuits, including the battery, alternator, lights, fuel 
pump(s), ignition and electrical controls.   
All battery current must flow through this switch 
b. Be direct acting, not act through a relay or logic.

final_answer: IC.9.3.2 Function - the Primary Master Switch must: a. Disconnect power to ALL electrical circuits, including the battery, alternator, lights, fuel pump(s), ignition and electrical controls. All battery current must flow through this switch b. Be direct acting, not act through a relay or logic.
